workspace.freshIsolatedDesc: A fresh isolated workspace will be created when this issue runs.

workspace.noRuntimeRunning: No runtime services are currently running for this workspace.

workspace.noRuntimeDefined: No runtime config is currently defined on this execution workspace or its project workspace.
workspace.projectWorkspaceDesc: Configure the concrete workspace Paperclip attaches to this project. These values drive per-workspace checkout behavior, default runtime services for child execution workspaces, and let you override setup or cleanup commands when one workspace needs special handling.
workspace.isPrimaryWorkspace: This is the project's primary codebase workspace.
workspace.executionWorkspaceDesc: This execution workspace contains a concrete, ephemeral checkout used for a single run or a series of runs on an issue.
workspace.provisionCommandHint: Runs when Paperclip prepares this execution workspace
workspace.teardownCommandHint: Runs when the execution workspace is archived or cleaned up
workspace.runtimeServicesJsonHint: Concrete workspace runtime settings for this execution workspace. Leave this inheriting unless you need a one-off override.
workspace.runtimeConfigSourceExecWorkspace: This execution workspace currently overrides the project workspace runtime config.
workspace.runtimeConfigSourceProjectWorkspace: This execution workspace is inheriting the project workspace runtime config.
workspace.runtimeConfigSourceNone: No runtime config is currently defined on this execution workspace or its project workspace.
workspace.noRuntimeServicesRunning: No runtime services are currently running for this execution workspace.
workspace.noRuntimeConfigDefined: No runtime config is defined for this execution workspace yet.
workspace.linkedIssuesDesc: Issues that are currently attached to this execution workspace.
workspace.noWorkspaceOperations: No workspace operations have been recorded yet.
workspace.noLinkedIssues: No issues are currently linked to this execution workspace.

outputFeedback.consentDescription: Choose whether voted AI outputs can be shared with Paperclip Labs. This answer becomes the default for future thumbs up and thumbs down votes.
outputFeedback.consentLocalNote: This vote is always saved locally.

outputFeedback.consentChangeNote: You can change this later in Instance Settings > General.

pathInstructions.title: How to get a full path
pathInstructions.description: Paste the absolute path (e.g. /Users/you/project) into the input field.

mac.step1: Open Finder and navigate to the folder.
mac.step3: Hold the Option (⌥) key — "Copy" changes to "Copy as Pathname".
mac.step4: Click "Copy as Pathname", then paste here.
mac.tip: You can also open Terminal, type cd, drag the folder into the terminal window, and press Enter. Then type pwd to see the full path.

windows.step1: Open File Explorer and navigate to the folder.
windows.step2: Click in the address bar at the top — the full path will appear.
windows.step3: Copy the path, then paste here.
windows.tip: Alternatively, hold Shift and right-click the folder, then select "Copy as path".

linux.step1: Open a terminal and navigate to the directory with cd.
linux.step2: Run pwd to print the full path.
linux.step3: Copy the output and paste here.
linux.tip: In most file managers, Ctrl+L reveals the full path in the address bar.

reportsToPicker.staleMissingNote: Saved manager is missing from this company. Choose a new manager or clear.

agentConfig.specifyPathDescription: Browser security blocks apps from reading full local paths via a file picker. Copy the absolute path and paste it into the input.

mac.step2: Hold Option and right-click the folder.
mac.step4: Paste the result into the path input.

windows.step1: Find the folder in File Explorer.
windows.step2: Hold Shift and right-click the folder.
windows.step4: Paste the result into the path input.

terminal.step3: Copy the output and paste it into the path input.

concurrencyPolicy.coalesceIfActive: Keep one follow-up run queued while an active run is still working.
concurrencyPolicy.alwaysEnqueue: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if several runs stack up.
concurrencyPolicy.skipIfActive: Drop overlapping trigger occurrences while the routine is already active.

catchUpPolicy.skipMissed: Ignore schedule windows that were missed while the routine or scheduler was paused.
catchUpPolicy.enqueueMissedWithCap: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.
